name: ocr
description: Real text recognition via Tesseract (libtesseract) — genuine OCR, not a mock. Reads text out of images loaded through vision.kh (PNG/JPEG/BMP/GIF/...); also does word-level bounding boxes, auto orientation correction, searchable PDF export, character whitelisting, and multi-language recognition. Requires libtesseract to be installed at build time.
author: khandev1211-cpu
